mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_DepartmentList(id, departId, name, name_en, parentId, parentOrder, createTime, updateTime) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.departId}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameEn}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.parentOrder}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT departId FROM VX_DepartmentList WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT d.departId FROM VX_DepartmentList d LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentList p ON d.parentId = p.departId WHERE d.name = #{name} AND p.name = #{parentName}

SELECT d.departId FROM VX_DepartmentList d LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentList p ON d.parentId = p.departId LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentList gp ON p.parentId = gp.departId WHERE d.name = #{name} AND (p.name = #{parentName} OR gp.name = #{firstLevelName})
